full_text:
Chang Xi 昌豨
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chang Xi (昌豨). One of the Taishan Bandits. Joined and rebelled against Cao Cao several times. Chang Xi was a bandit affiliated with Liu Bei and the Wei Kingdom. Chang Xi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
